series_metadata.series_title: State Agency Personnel Action Signature Authorizations
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of signature authorization forms with name of persons who have authorization to sign Personnel Actions (ePAR) for appointing authority for each Agency, Board & Commission.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 8 years after new appointing authority is designated, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 8 years after new appointing authority is designated, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
